errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: This screen ran into an unexpected error. You can reload to continue.

search.subtitle: Search text that has appeared on your screen and jump to the screenshot and moment.
search.placeholder: Type keywords, e.g. a sentence from a page you saw…
search.hint: Results come from the local OCR index of your screenshots; content becomes searchable only after it has been captured and recognized, and screenshots follow the retention setting.
search.initial: Type keywords to search what has appeared on your screen
search.emptyHint: Try different keywords; only content that was captured and recognized can be found.
search.textFallbackNotice: The screenshot was cleaned up per the retention policy; below is the screen text recognized at the time

appearance.description: Choose how the interface looks. Applies instantly and is saved on this device.

dark.name: Dark
dark.desc: Dark background, easy on the eyes at night

capture.title: Capture
capture.description: Periodically record the focused window and a screenshot, so you can review activity later.
capture.enableDescription: When off, background capture stops (both window activity and screenshots).
capture.ocrResidentDescription: Recognizes new screenshots instantly (~400 MB extra RAM); pauses on battery.
capture.intervalHint:
Screenshots trigger when:
• Switching apps → captured immediately
• Browser changes URL → captured immediately
• Same window stays focused for the configured interval → captured
capture.idleDescription: Treat the user as away after this much mouse/keyboard inactivity.
capture.idleHint:
Detection uses system-level mouse / keyboard / trackpad events.
Set to 0 to disable (never trigger).
capture.dataPathHint: Location of the database and the default screenshots root. Changing requires a restart, and old data must be migrated manually.
capture.backfillDescription: Index screenshots taken before screen memory was enabled, so Chat can search them.
capture.backfillBackground: Registered; indexing continues in the background (you can leave this page)
capture.backfillRuntimeMissing: The text recognition (OCR) component needs an update (~40MB): go to AI Settings → Engine and click the download button.
capture.ocrConfirmResident: Enabling text indexing requires downloading the text recognition component (~40MB). It turns on automatically once the download finishes.
capture.ocrConfirmBackfill: Backfilling requires downloading the text recognition component (~40MB). Backfill starts automatically once the download finishes.

workHours.title: Work hours
workHours.description: Only capture activity during the specified hours.

startup.title: Startup behavior
startup.autoStartDescription: Hindsight starts automatically after you log in.
startup.showWindowDescription: When off, start silently in the tray.
startup.minimizeToTrayDescriptionMac: When off, clicking X quits the app.
startup.minimizeToTrayDescriptionWin: When off, clicking X quits the app.

dataRootDialog.title: Switch data folder?

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Screenshot retention and current usage. The database is never auto-cleaned.
storage.retentionDescription: Expired screenshot files are deleted automatically (activity records are kept).
storage.modelsPathHint: After changing the path, models in the old folder are not migrated — copy them over manually, or re-download them in the new location.

cleanup.title: Local data cleanup
cleanup.description: Clear local data or screenshot files to free disk space.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Actions below affect every device and cannot be undone.
danger.removeDeviceDescription: Remove all of this device's data from cloud

purgeDialog.purgeDbMessage:
The local database will be cleared, and the next sync will re-pull all history from the cloud. Cloud Drive files are untouched; other devices unaffected.

⚠️ This cannot be undone.
purgeDialog.shotsMessage: All saved screenshot files will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

removeDeviceDialog.title: Remove this device from cloud
removeDeviceDialog.intro: All of this device's data in the cloud will be deleted. After syncing, other devices will also forget the records about this device — as if this device had never connected to the cloud.
removeDeviceDialog.unaffected: Unaffected: other devices' own data, and new data produced on this device from now on.
removeDeviceDialog.localQuestion: What about this device's local copy?
removeDeviceDialog.alsoClearHint: Completely clean. For: leaving a job, selling the machine, privacy cleanup.
removeDeviceDialog.keepHint: Cloud cleared, local data preserved. Use this when switching to a different Google account and migrating local data over.
removeDeviceDialog.doneAlsoClear: Removed: {{count}} Drive file(s) deleted + peers notified to clear this device's mirror. Local data also cleared.
removeDeviceDialog.doneKeepLocal: Removed: {{count}} Drive file(s) deleted + peers notified to clear this device's mirror. Local data preserved — sign in to a new account to re-upload.

export.rowDescription: Export daily / weekly / monthly statistics to a file. Raw activity records are not included.
export.invalidRange: The start date must not be later than the end date.

json.label: JSON · Structured
json.hint: Complete structured data for programs and further processing.

markdown.label: Markdown · Report
markdown.hint: A readable text report — great for reading directly or archiving in your notes app.

xlsx.label: Excel · Spreadsheet
xlsx.hint: Multiple sheets — overview, trends and raw details; filter, sort and chart directly.

file.title: Hindsight usage statistics ({{start}} – {{end}})
file.metaNote: Weekly / monthly stats cover full calendar weeks (Mon–Sun) / months and may extend beyond the selected range; app tables list the top {{n}} only.

xlsx.rawTruncated: Row count exceeds the Excel limit; only the first 1,000,000 rows are kept.
xlsx.note: Durations are shown as h:mm; the daily average only counts completed days — the in-progress today is excluded.

export.included: Will include: {{list}} (chosen automatically from the date range)

browser.title: Browser filter
browser.info: Skip screenshots when the browser address bar URL contains any of these (case-insensitive).

app.title: App filter
app.info: Skip screenshots when the app name or window title contains any of these (case-insensitive).

scope.title: Scope
scope.info: When matched, only screenshots are skipped
scope.noticePrefix: Screenshot filtering is a local-only behavior,
scope.noticeEmph: it does not affect screenshots already saved
scope.noticeMiddle: . To clear historical screenshots, go to

status.installing: Downloading and installing — the app will restart when done…

dialog.title: New version v{{version}} available

timeRangeList.empty: No ranges set — capturing all day

segmentList.empty: No segments yet — click "Add segment" below to start
segmentList.swatchAutoTitle: Auto-gradient based on hour of day

donut.hint: Click a slice to drill in

categories.title: Categories
categories.intro: Manage activity categories. Assign apps to categories on the Apps page.

super.emptyHint: Drag a category onto a super-category label to assign

deleteDialog.title: Delete super-category
deleteDialog.message: Delete super-category "{{name}}"? Its categories will move back to "Ungrouped"; they won't be deleted.

deleteDialog.title: Delete category
deleteDialog.message: Delete category "{{name}}"? Its apps will be returned to "Other".

pairing.infoTipBody: The same app may have different process names on different systems ("Code" on macOS, "Visual Studio Code" on Windows). Without pairing, time is counted as two separate apps and the category has to be set on each device. Once paired, the name, category, icon, and time are unified.
pairing.instructionSuffix: to move the same app onto one row — unifying name, category, and merged time.
pairing.unassignedHint: Unassigned rows are highlighted in yellow
pairing.noDevices: No device data yet. Check back after capturing for a while.

engine.sectionDesc: Hindsight ships with the llama.cpp inference engine and runs everything locally — screenshots are never uploaded to any external service.

noCuda.headline: NVIDIA CUDA was not detected.
noCuda.prefix: Vision LLMs run very slowly on CPU. We recommend installing the
noCuda.suffix: (≥ 12.4) first; Hindsight will automatically switch to the GPU-accelerated variant after a restart.

engine.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall the local AI engine? Model files will not be affected.
engine.uninstallConfirmMessage: Model files will not be affected.

actions.testTooltipReady: Start the engine (if not running) and verify by hitting the local /v1/models endpoint
actions.releaseVramTooltip: Stop the engine and free GPU memory now. It will spawn again automatically on the next summary run.
actions.releaseVramTooltipNotRunning: Engine is not running — nothing to release
actions.openFolderTooltipInstalled: Reveal the install folder in the file manager

ocr.name: Text recognition (OCR) component
ocr.desc: Used by screen memory for text recognition; runs on the GPU (DirectML, any graphics card including integrated).
ocr.macNativeDesc: macOS uses the built-in system recognition (Vision) — nothing to download.
ocr.upgradeHint: An older component version was detected; re-download to upgrade to GPU acceleration.
ocr.uninstallConfirmMessage: Screen-text indexing will be unavailable until you download it again. Existing indexes are unaffected.

engineParams.vramBreakdown: (weights {{weights}} + KV cache {{kv}} + ~2.0 overhead · for {{params}}B model + {{ctx}}K ctx × {{slots}} slot(s))

models.sectionDesc: LLM used for local inference; GGUF files are downloaded from HuggingFace.

cloud.summaryConfirmTitle: Send summary data to the cloud?
cloud.summaryConfirmMessage: Routing Text to the cloud sends app names, categories, and the activity timeline to {{provider}} on every segment summary. The screenshot images themselves are not uploaded by this option.

card.pauseTooltip: Pause the current download. Partial bytes are kept; resume later picks up where you left off.

capsTooltips.TEXT: Text generation — write / continue / summarize prose.
capsTooltips.CODE: Code-tuned — better at writing and explaining code.
capsTooltips.FAST: Lightweight (< 1GB), speed first; great for first try.
capsTooltips.BALANCED: Mid-size, balances quality and speed for everyday use.
capsTooltips.REASONING: Deep reasoning — multi-step thinking, math, planning.
capsTooltips.R1: DeepSeek R1 family — RL-trained reasoning model.
capsTooltips.DEFAULT: Hindsight's top pick — best overall balance.

card.step2ToggleOnTooltip: Use this model for segment summaries (Text). Replaces the previous selection.
card.step2ToggleOffTooltip: Click to clear the Text selection (will fall back to the legacy active model).

models.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall {{name}}? This will delete the main weights{{extra}} — cannot be undone.
models.uninstallConfirmMessage: This will delete the main weights{{extra}}. The action cannot be undone.

expand.busyTooltip: Can collapse only after downloads finish

custom.hint: Download any GGUF file from a HuggingFace repo. The file must be loadable by llama.cpp; the mmproj field is only needed for vision models.
custom.errorRequired: Repository and main weights file are required.

import.tooltip: Copy a GGUF file you already have on disk into the models folder

local.title: Local models (not in the recommended list)
local.orphanMmproj: This is a vision projector file (mmproj) and cannot be used as a model by itself. To import a model, pick the much larger main GGUF file from the same repository.

brief.sectionInfo: Included in AI summaries to help the model understand your work and context.
brief.placeholder: e.g. I'm a backend developer who mostly writes Rust and TypeScript; on weekends I tinker with games.

prompt.sectionDesc: Tell the model how to write summaries. Each language has a built-in default; click Save after editing, or Reset to revert to default.

actions.resetTooltip: Refill the editor with the built-in default (click Save to apply)
actions.saveTooltip: Save the override for the current language

segments.sectionInfo: AI summaries are produced per segment; screenshots within each segment are sampled by similarity before being sent to the model.

filter.rowHint:
Click to toggle:
• Colored + category icon = included in AI analysis
• Gray outline + closed-eye icon = excluded

external.sectionDesc: Generate segment summaries and Chat answers with a cloud model. Screenshots are never uploaded.
external.enableHint: When on, segment summaries and Chat call the API configured below; screenshots are never uploaded.
external.missingFields: Fill in Base URL and Model ID first
external.privacyNote: Note: the Text API serves segment summaries and Chat — app names, categories, the activity timeline, your questions and matching screen text are sent to it. API keys are stored in plain text in local settings.
external.kimiBaseUrlNote: Keys for api.moonshot.cn (China) and api.moonshot.ai (global) are not interchangeable — use the site where your key was issued.

autoSummary.sectionDesc: Generate reports automatically when a period ends — no more clicking "Generate".
autoSummary.enableHint: Fills in yesterday's daily report and last week's weekly report automatically; failed runs are not retried. Monthly reports will join once available

devices.title: Devices
devices.meta: Manage this device's name and the sync status of other devices.
devices.emptyOthers: Sign in with the same account on another device to see it here.

desc.signInPrompt: Sign in with Google to sync activity data across devices via Drive. Screenshots are never uploaded.
desc.configurePrompt: Before first use, create an OAuth credential in Google Cloud Console (about 3 minutes).

actions.reauthTitle: Credentials expired — sign in again to refresh the token

cloud.restartHint: Signed in to a new account. Restart the app to switch to that account's local database.

datasets.title: What to sync
datasets.hint: By default only basic data (usage stats, categories) is synced. The items below contain more sensitive information and must be enabled individually; screenshot images themselves never leave this device.

summaries.label: AI summary text
summaries.desc: Generated daily / weekly report text, for reading reports across devices.
summaries.warn: When enabled, the full text of your daily and weekly reports (including file names, page and video titles mentioned in them) will be uploaded to your Google Drive app-data area and synced to other devices signed into the same account.

chat.label: Chat history
chat.desc: Chat conversations and messages, to continue across devices.
chat.warn: When enabled, all Chat conversations and messages — including your questions and the screen-text snippets cited in answers — will be uploaded to your Google Drive app-data area and synced to other devices.

memory.label: Screen memory (full text)
memory.desc: Index of text that appeared on your screen, for cross-device search. Most sensitive.
memory.warn: When enabled, the full text of your screen-memory index — the verbatim content that appeared on your screen (chats, emails, code, web pages, etc.) — will be uploaded to your Google Drive app-data area and synced to other devices. This is the most sensitive tier; make sure you trust every device on this account.

datasets.confirmNote: Data is stored only in your own Google Drive app-data area (invisible to other apps). You can turn this off at any time and remove it with “Clear cloud data”.

oauthFallback.hint: Browser didn’t open? Copy the sign-in link and paste it into any browser.

errors.credExpired: Credentials expired. Please sign in again.
errors.transient: Sync hit a transient error; retrying automatically…

step2.title: Configure the OAuth consent screen
step2.bodyMiddle: → fill in any app name and email → set Audience to External → enter your email again under contact info → click

step3.title: Create the OAuth client
step3.bodyPrefix: Open Clients on the left → click
step3.bodySuffix: at the top → pick Desktop app as the application type → use any name. The Client ID and Client Secret will then be shown.

step4.title: Paste the Client ID and Client Secret below

other.forgetTitle: Permanently remove this device from the cloud

forgetDialog.title: Forget "{{name}}" from the cloud?
forgetDialog.intro: This permanently deletes all data this device has in Google Drive, plus every activity record tied to it on this and any other machine. Other devices will clean up this device's data the next time they connect to the cloud.
forgetDialog.unaffected: Use this when the device is no longer with you (sold / lost / replaced) and you didn't clear its data from the cloud at the time — the leftover records still show up on your other devices.
forgetDialog.doneToast: "{{name}}" removed from the cloud ({{count}} Drive files deleted).

errors.runBusy: Another AI generation task is already running. Wait for it to finish, or press Stop first.
errors.llmEmptyReasoning: The model spent its entire budget thinking and never wrote the answer. Update the app and retry (new builds disable local thinking by default); if it persists, switch to a non-reasoning (instruct) model or raise this step's context size.
errors.llmEmptyEos: The model stopped without generating anything — usually the chosen model or its vision projector (mmproj) don't match. Pick a different model in AI Settings.
errors.llmEmptyTruncated: The model's answer was cut off before any usable text came out (likely a reasoning model). Use a regular text model like Gemma or Qwen3, or raise the context size in AI Settings.
errors.llmEmpty: The model returned no content. Try a different model in AI Settings.

weekly.title: Weekly
weekly.hint: Weekly activity rollup with date + theme breakdown.
weekly.subtitle: Synthesize this week's daily reports into a single weekly review

actions.startTooltip: Builds a weekly review from this week's existing daily reports — no screenshots, much faster than daily
actions.regenerateTooltip: Regenerating will clear and replace this week's weekly report
actions.noModelTooltip: Pick a summary model in AI Settings → Models, or enable Cloud API
actions.deleteTooltip: Clear this week's weekly report (does not affect daily reports)
actions.deleteEmptyTooltip: No weekly report yet to delete
actions.deleteConfirmMessage: The weekly report content will be cleared. Daily reports are unaffected. This cannot be undone.
actions.exportTooltip: Export the current weekly report as a Markdown file
actions.exportEmptyTooltip: No weekly report to export yet
actions.exportRunningTooltip: Weekly report is generating; export after it finishes

errors.noSummaryModel: Pick a summary model in AI Settings → Models, or enable Cloud API

partialMissing.title: Some days don't have a daily report
partialMissing.message: {{count}} day(s) this week have no daily report: {{dates}}. If you continue, those days will use only their app stats in place of a daily report; the rest will still use the daily reports as usual. Continue?

fullMissing.title: No daily reports for this week
fullMissing.message: None of the 7 days this week has a daily report, but {{activityCount}} of them have app usage records to work from. Generating will only produce a simplified weekly review based on app stats — noticeably lower quality than with daily reports. Continue?
fullMissing.messageNoActivity: None of the 7 days this week has a daily report, and there are no app usage records either. Generation will very likely fail. Try anyway?

body.empty: Click "Generate" above to synthesize a weekly review from this week's daily reports.
body.engineStarting: Loading model — about 30-90s for the first run…
body.summarizing: The model is synthesizing this week's daily reports into a weekly review…

monthly.title: Monthly
monthly.hint: Monthly activity trends and highlights. Feature in development.

daily.subtitle: Per-segment rollup of today's activity timeline, generated by a local model.

runtimeMissing.title: AI engine not installed
runtimeMissing.message: Generating summaries locally requires the AI engine (llama.cpp). Generation continues automatically once the download finishes.

actions.startTooltip: The local model summarizes each segment's activity timeline in turn; duration depends on hardware (a few seconds per segment on GPU, tens of seconds on CPU).
actions.regenerateTooltip: Regenerating clears all segment summaries for this day and runs them again.
actions.noModelTooltip: Pick a model in AI Settings → Models first.
actions.deleteTooltip: Clear ai_summaries (source=daily) for this day (cannot be undone).
actions.deleteEmptyTooltip: No daily data yet to delete.
actions.deleteConfirmMessage: All segment summaries for this day will be cleared. The Debug tab is unaffected. This cannot be undone.
actions.exportTooltip: Export all segment summaries for the current date as a Markdown file.
actions.exportEmptyTooltip: No segment summaries to export yet.
actions.exportRunningTooltip: Summary in progress — wait until it finishes before exporting.
actions.retryDisabledTooltip: Whole-day summary is running; wait until it finishes or is stopped before retrying.

errors.noModel: Pick a model in AI Settings → Models first.

body.empty: Click "Start summary" above to generate this segment.
body.skipped: No screenshots in this time range (computer was off / everything was on the privacy list / everything was in excluded categories).
body.skippedNoActivity: Nothing was recorded in this time range (computer was off / everything was in excluded categories).

export.heading: Daily report — {{dateLabel}} · {{date}}
export.stateSkipped: ⚪ **Skipped** — no screenshots in this time range
export.stateSkippedNoActivity: ⚪ **Skipped** — nothing was recorded in this time range

cloudOffer.title: Generate with your cloud API instead?
cloudOffer.message: A cloud API is already configured ({{provider}} · {{model}}), but summaries are currently set to a local model and the local engine isn't installed. Confirm to switch summaries to the cloud API — app names, categories and the activity timeline will be sent to that provider. Alternatively, download the local engine under AI Settings → Engine.

actions.startInfo: Regenerate segment summaries for this day.
actions.clearSummariesTooltip: Clear all segment summaries for this day (cannot be undone).
actions.clearSummariesConfirm: Delete all segment summaries for {{date}}? This cannot be undone.
actions.exportSummariesMdTooltip: Export all segment summaries for this day as a Markdown file.
actions.exportSummariesMdEmptyTooltip: No segment summaries to export yet.
actions.startTooltipReady: Debug mode: re-runs every segment for the day (clears existing results), segment summaries stream live.
actions.startTooltipNoModel: Pick a model in AI Settings → Models first.

errors.noModel: Pick a model in AI Settings → Models first.

debug.scopePlaceholder: {{type}} debug pending backend implementation. Switch back to "Daily" to debug the daily segment-summary flow.

segPrompt.title: Segment summary prompt
segPrompt.description: Used when summarizing the segment's activity timeline into a segment summary. Changes apply to this window only.
segPrompt.label: Prompt

segments.title: Segment summary
segments.empty: No segment summary yet. Click "Run" above to have the model summarize the segment's activity timeline.

events.label: Event stream (rolling 200)
events.empty: No events yet. They will scroll in here once you click Run.

engineLogs.label: Engine log
engineLogs.refreshTooltip: Fetch recent stderr / stdout from the llama-server child process.
engineLogs.copyTooltip: Copy all log lines to the clipboard.
engineLogs.emptyPrefix: No log fetched yet. Click "Refresh" above to fetch once; content appears only after the engine has run a summary. Look for
engineLogs.emptySuffix: lines to tell whether the GPU is being used.

chat.title: Chat

empty.title: What would you like to ask?
empty.hint: Try one of the examples below, or just type at the bottom.

browser.label: Browser
browser.q: What did I look at in my browser today?

video.label: YouTube
video.q: How long did I spend on YouTube today?

mail.label: Email
mail.q: How much time did I spend on email today?

searchkw.label: Searches
searchkw.q: What did I search for today?

conversations.deleteMessage: The conversation and all its messages will be permanently deleted.

privacy.title: Before you send
privacy.body: Your question and matching screen-memory text snippets will be sent to the model as context.
privacy.bodyCloud: Cloud API is configured: this data will be sent to a third-party provider.

chat.localModelHint: Heads-up: chat relies on tool calling, which very small local models may handle unreliably. A more capable local model gives better results.

backfill.pending: {{count}} screenshots are not yet in the text index; chat may miss them.
backfill.alreadyRunning: Indexing is running in the background, {{count}} remaining
backfill.runtimeMissing: The text recognition (OCR) component needs an update (~40MB): go to AI Settings → Engine and click the download button.
backfill.ocrConfirmMessage: Building the text index requires downloading the text recognition component (~40MB). Indexing starts automatically once the download finishes.
backfill.stoppedNotice: Batch stopped; resident recognition resumes in about a minute

model.empty: No models available: configure a cloud API or download a local model

tokens.prompt: Tokens sent to the model this turn (upstream)
